## Domain addition

**Domain:** `                    `

**Status:** verified / unclaimed

**Source:** `submit` (if you're the owner, use `self`)

---

### Checklist

- [ ] Domain is not already in `registry/domains.txt`
- [ ] Domain is a real, publicly accessible API
- [ ] If `verified`: I confirmed `/.well-known/agent.json` is served with valid JSON
- [ ] I added exactly one line to the end of `registry/domains.txt`
- [ ] I did **not** modify `registry/snapshot.json` (it's auto-generated)
- [ ] The line follows the format: `domain | status | source | YYYY-MM-DD` (use today's date)
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
